mapper.select: SELECT driver_id AS driverId, driver_name AS driverName, driver_phone AS driverPhone, driver_status AS driverStatus FROM delivery_drivers WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY driver_id DESC
SELECT driver_id AS driverId, driver_name AS driverName, driver_phone AS driverPhone, driver_status AS driverStatus FROM delivery_drivers WHERE driver_id = #{driverId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE deliveries SET driver_id = #{driverId}, delivery_status = 'ASSIGNED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE delivery_id = #{deliveryId}
